title: bun toolchain vars
description: bun toolchain vars that can be set

BUN_VERSION.description: Version of Bun demanded. Can be a specific version number like 'bun-v1.1.0' or an alias.

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

BUN_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install BUN. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.
